Instruction: Describe the target grid.
Generate the referring expression starting with the tag "Expression: " for the given target grid. Omit any other text.

Pattern: Column 1 is X, column 2 is □, columns 3-4 are X, column 5 is □

Key differences:
- Target has the first column filled (X), while Distractor 1 has first two columns empty
- Target has two empty columns in the middle (columns 2-3), while Distractor 2 has only one empty column (column 2)
- Target has the last two columns filled (X), while Distractor 2 has only column 4 filled and column 5 empty

The most distinguishing feature is that the target has:
- One filled column on the left (column 1)
- Two empty columns in the middle (columns 2-3)
- Two filled columns on the right (columns 4-5)

Or more simply: X pattern on the left side (1 column), empty in the middle (2 columns), X pattern on the right side (2 columns).

content.text: Expression: A grid with one filled column on the left, two empty columns in the middle, and two filled columns on the right.

clem_player.response: Expression: A grid with one filled column on the left, two empty columns in the middle, and two filled columns on the right.
